article.title: With a systems approach to chips, Microsoft aims to tailor everything ‘from silicon to service’ to meet AI demand - Source

resharedPost.text: Today at #MSIgnite we’re unveiling the first generation of Microsoft’s custom silicon as part of our holistic systems approach to co-designing hardware and software. The Azure Maia AI Accelerator and Azure Cobalt general-purpose CPU will help us build even more diversity and customization into our infrastructure to deliver in the era of #AI.

comments.text: Awesome to see Azure Hardware & Silicon team's work kick off an amazing line-up of AI announcements at Ignite today!

author.occupation: EVP, Product at Booz Allen Hamilton

comments.text: Congratulations to you and the teams across Microsoft on the BIG announcement, Rani, Wes, Selim, Pat, and Gohar! Historic day!
